name: Firewall Block Malicious IP
description: Enriches a flagged IP address across multiple threat intelligence sources (VirusTotal, AbuseIPDB, GreyNoise), then routes based on reputation score. If the IP is confirmed malicious, the workflow requests analyst approval before pushing a firewall block rule, adding the IP to the External Dynamic List (EDL), and notifying the SOC on Slack. Benign IPs are annotated and closed without action.
author: T1 Agentics

required_integrations.name: VirusTotal
required_integrations.reason: IP reputation lookup and malicious activity scoring

required_integrations.name: AbuseIPDB
required_integrations.reason: Abuse confidence score and report history for the flagged IP

required_integrations.name: Palo Alto NGFW
required_integrations.reason: Push firewall block rule to deny traffic from the malicious IP

config.description: Triggers when a potentially malicious IP is flagged by network monitoring or firewall alerts

config.additional_instructions: Enrich the flagged IP using VirusTotal, AbuseIPDB, and GreyNoise. Aggregate reputation scores and determine a combined malicious confidence rating.
config.description: Queries VirusTotal, AbuseIPDB, and GreyNoise to build a comprehensive reputation profile for the flagged IP address
Routes based on whether the aggregated threat intelligence indicates malicious or suspicious activity

config.message:
IP {{trigger_1.alert.source_ip}} flagged as malicious.

Verdict: {{analyze_1.verdict}} (Confidence: {{analyze_1.confidence}})
Findings: {{analyze_1.key_findings}}

Approve firewall block?
config.description: Requires SOC analyst approval before executing the firewall block to prevent accidental disruption

parameters.comment: Blocked by T1 playbook — Verdict: {{analyze_1.verdict}}, Alert: {{trigger_1.alert.alert_id}}

config.description: Adds a deny rule on the Palo Alto NGFW to block all traffic from the malicious IP
Adds the malicious IP to the External Dynamic List so all perimeter devices automatically block it
Sends a summary notification to the SOC Slack channel confirming the block action and enrichment results

parameters.note: IP {{trigger_1.alert.source_ip}} enriched and determined benign. Verdict: {{analyze_1.verdict}}. No block action required. Closing alert.

config.description: Annotates the alert as benign based on threat intelligence enrichment and closes it without action
Firewall block malicious IP workflow complete
